TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_A-la-tin, title = A-la-tin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/A-la-tin} }

S.FORM: A-la-tin (kamu nu Hulam: ťėŅśčČšłĀ, kamu nu In-gu: Aladdin) kakungkuan a kamu Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) u A-ke-la-pa (Agrabah, ťėŅś†ľśčČŚ∑ī) wan-kuo Su-dan wan a Ta-wi-ci-e , mangalay cinida micumud i mitimaay a buhungan, dayhan tiyabuhung idaw ku muenengay a lalimenah nu di'tu a dinki. (Iago)ÁôľÁŹĺ, . nika, cinida atu nida matineng musakamuay a ayam ci Ay-ke (lago ŤČĺś†ľ) maadih nida, u kumiculimekay "caay henay kaw masaditay nu bunaw" atu cabay nida taneng micumud tina buhangan. . Sudan a tataynaan a wawa nida ci Mu-li kun-cu makai cinida tu caayay kalipahakay anikaudipan, sisa laliwan nida ku hun-kun , makatukuh i Ake-lapa (Agrabah, ťėŅś†ľśčČŚ∑ī) a nabakuan midang miales tuna balucu'an. . itida, malitemuh nida i patiyamay ku cacay a wawa ci A-la-tin atu kanamuhan nida a ungay ci Abu . matineng ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) alaw ci A-la-tin kuyda sa "caay henay kaw masaditay nu bunaw" , dakep hantu nida. sakamusa ci Mu-li kun-cu paydaneng ci A-la-tin , nika ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) pabeban nida mapatay tu ci A-la-tin sa. misababalaki ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ), alanida ci A-la-tinan namakayda i papululan pataydahan i buhung. i buhungay idaw ku cacaya a tana' ladayen kuheni mikilim tu di'tu a dinki, tawya sacumud nu buhung sakamusa u di'tu nu dinki acacay ku tiyungan amanan pitiyun tu cancanan, nika ci A-la-tin maala satu nida ku di'tu a dinki, ci Apu mangalay henay miubi tu i buhungay a sumanahay nu bunaw, sisa pelad satu ku buhung. ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) kusaan anumaala numaku ku di'tu a dinki sa a patayen numaku ci A-la-tin sa, nika ci Apu kalad hanida ku lima ni Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ), alawen nida ku di'tu a dinki pasaydan nida i putah milaliw. kilul satu, mapelad kiyu buhung, manengil satu ci A-la-tin , maadih nida cinidatu caayay henay piliyas tina buhungan, sisa awawen nida ku di'tu a dinki a lalimenah . u lalimenah sakamusa ci A-la-tin nan, taneng cinida asingalih ci A-la-tin tu tuluay a kasingalihan, ci A-la-tin sakamu hanida ku lalimenah , mangalay cinida acaay kasingalih tunu udip tu a kasingalihan miliyas tina buhungan. ina lalimenah midateng henay tu sapisulul ci A-la-tin , palita han ni A-la-tin ku lalimenah mahica ku nidatengan numisu sa. sakamusa ku lalimenah, hatiniay tu nutenes numaku itini mapulul i dindinki, sisa mangalay kaku tuci A-la-tin na misanu duma a cacaya nida tu nidatengan paka miliys tu lalimenah miliyas tina dinkian. . mihangsa ci A-la-tin , sisa ladayen nu lalimenah kuheni miliyas tina buhungan, ci A-la-tin hantu sisa cukaymasen nida ku sakacacay a nidatengan: mala sikalisiway sikawaway a wan-ce, ci Apu hantu mala zu, mahinisa taneng tu maleacawa atu ci Mu-li kun-cu . mangalay ci Cia-fang (Jafar Ť≥ąśĖĻ) apacebu ci Su-danan nan, mangalay pakasiacwa ci Mu-li kun-cu cinidaan, kiya taneng micumud i hun-kun amipatay ci kun-cu atu ci Sudan nan, mahini sa taneng kaku mikuwan tu A-ke-ba-la (Agrabah, ťėŅś†ľśčČŚ∑ī). nika, ina kiyaku nida tuni kabahal ni A-la-tin anika tahekalan maputun kiya kawaw. bahal sa micumud ci A-la-tin i hun-kun, sakamusa tu cinidaan ci A-li wun-ce kaku sa, nika ci Mu-li kun-cu caay pa'lihi nida, nasan tu cinidaan namaka putahay tayni micumud mibulibulilay a siw-cuo sa. tawya a labi, malalitemuh aca ni Mu-li kun-cu ci A-la-tin , ci A-la-tin cebalen nida ku tana' ladayen nida ci Mu-li kun-cu tacuwacuwa miliwliw tu kanatal cacay a lalipayan, hidasatu, ci Mu-li kun-cu kiya mapalal makaadih, alawhan ina A-li wang-ce u tawyaay a demiad nika malitemuhan numaku i patiyamay a wawa han alaw ci A-la-tin nay. matineng ci A-la-tin misangan tu kakunkuan, sakamusa sawni a mangalay milaliw tu hunkun a sakaudip, sisa sumaden numaku ku udip numaku tayda i patiyamay a midang. nikudan satu, ci A-la-tin pataluma hatu nida ci Mu-li kun-cuan patayni i hun-kun, kakisu satu satu kunuheni tatusa. nipa talumaan satu ci Mu-li kun-cu itini i hun-kun, ci A-la-tin dakepen ni Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ), sakamuen nida ku misebengay a tademaw siketen ci A-la-tin sipibakah pasaydan i bayu amibakah. awawen ni A-la-tin ku lalimenah sisa maala cinida maudip, sisa u sakatusa tu nida ku sasalungucan. ci A-la-tin taluma satu i hun-kun, sakamu hatu nida ci Mu-li kun-cuan atu ci Sudanan tu laecusay nu kiyakuan ni Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ), mapaaw namin kunuheni a tatusa tu wayway nida. ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) hantu matineng tu tada udip ni Prince Ali , sisa laliwsatu cinida i hunkun. makatengil ci Sudan tu icelang nu kawaw ni A-la-tin , pabalucu satu cinida tu wanwi a kawaw asipabeli palaylay ci A-la-tin nan. ayda satu, ci A-la-tin pabalucu mangalay mihalhal idaw kuni datenngan sapatahekal tu lalimenah kiya tawya midawis tina pabeli tu aenengan a kawaw. nikudan satu, ubien ni Ay-ke (lago, ŤČĺś†ľ) ku dinki nu di'tu, sipabeli nida ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) ngan, ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) cukaymasen nida ku saka cacay, saka tusa a nidatengan, mala Sudan nu saicelangay numi tizimaay a saydan, patayda hanida ci A-la-tin i masa cacaya nu sulesuledaan. ci A-la-tin kacawen nida ku di'tu a tana' taluma' i Agrabah , ci Mu-li kun-cu milawlaw tu balucu ni Cia-fang (Jafar Ť≥ąśĖĻ) ku mangalay miubi tu di'tu a dinki. nika, makadih ni Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) ci A-la-tin , milalebu cinidaan. ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) sakamusa tu udip u " i kitakit saicelangay nu tademaw kaku sa ", nika ci A-la-tin pacekilen nida, kanahatu hatida ku icelang numisu caay tu pikikaka tu lalimenah, dayhan u lalimenah yadah ku caaya kaw kakatinengan numita a kawaw nida. namahini satu, ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) cukamasen tu nida ku sakatulu a nidatengan, mala lalimenah. nika, mapawan ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ), anu mala lalimenah satu, amicumud tu i labu nu di'tu dinkian, anumahida satu kanca a awdaen kiya taneng a tahekal misalihalay. nikuda satu, ci A-la-tin hiyanida ci Cia-fang (JafarŤ≥ąśĖĻ) alaen nida ku baluhay a di'tu a dinki, pasu ci lago helupen nida mapulung a pacumud. lalimenah saamelik sa hiyan nida ku di'tu a dinki ni Cia-fang (Jafar Ť≥ąśĖĻ) sipatayda nida i nikatapaan nida tu di'tu a dinki nu punkangan. ci A-la-tin sadikuday idaw kuni pidatengan, paka lihalayen ku lalimenah sa, ina lalimenah tanunamuh sa mapaaw. ci Mu-li kun-cu manglay tuci A-la-tinan nan, sisa sumaden ni Sudan ku kawaw, kiya taneng ci Mu-li kun-cu siacawa ci A-la-tin (AladdinťėŅśčČšłĀ) nan, ci Mu-li kun-cu (Princess JasmineŤĆČŤéČŚÖ¨šłĽ) atu ci A-la-tin makakunyaku tu. ya lalimenah laliwsatu tu A-ke-la-ba (Agrabah ťėŅś†ľśčČŚ∑ī), yadatu tacuwcuwa mihaliyud tu kitakit. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan

a-r~…ĺa-tin dak…ôp…ôn ni ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **), sakamu…ôn nida ku mis…ôb…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw sik…ôt…ôn ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin sipibakańß pasajdan i baju amibakańß. awaw…ôn ni a-r~…ĺa-tin ku r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß sisa maar~…ĺa ¶inida maudip, sisa u sakatusa tu nida ku sasar~…ĺuŇču ¶an. ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin tar~…ĺuma satu i ńßun-kun, sakamu ńßatu nida ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶uan atu ¶i sudanan tu r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj nu kijakuan ni ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **), mapaaw namin kunuńß…ôni a tatusa tu wajwaj nida. ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) ńßantu matin…ôŇč tu tada udip ni prin ¶…ô ar~…ĺi , sisa r~…ĺar~…ĺiwsatu ¶inida i ńßunkun. makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ¶i sudan tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kawaw ni a-r~…ĺa-tin , pabar~…ĺu ¶u satu ¶inida tu wanwi a kawaw asipab…ôr~…ĺi par~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin nan. ajda satu, ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin pabar~…ĺu ¶u maŇčar~…ĺaj mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ idaw kuni dat…ônŇčan sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß kija tawja midawis tina pab…ôr~…ĺi tu a…ôn…ôŇčan a kawaw. nikudan satu, ubi…ôn ni aj-k…ô (r~…ĺago, **) ku dinki nu di Ē~ °tu, sipab…ôr~…ĺi nida ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) Ňčan, ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) ¶ukajmas…ôn nida ku saka ¶a ¶aj, saka tusa a nidat…ôŇčan, mar~…ĺa sudan nu sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj numi tizimaaj a sajdan, patajda ńßanida ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin i masa ¶a ¶aja nu sur~…ĺ…ôsur~…ĺ…ôdaan. ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin ka ¶aw…ôn nida ku di Ē~ °tu a tana Ē~ ° tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i agrabańß , ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu bar~…ĺu ¶u ni ¶ia-faŇč (*afar **) ku maŇčar~…ĺaj miubi tu di Ē~ °tu a dinki. nika, makadińß ni ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin , mir~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu ¶inidaan. ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) sakamusa tu udip u " i kitakit sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu tad…ômaw kaku sa ", nika ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin pa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ…ôn nida, kanańßatu ńßatida ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč numisu ¶aaj tu pikikaka tu r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß, dajńßan u r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß jadańß ku ¶aaja kaw kakatin…ôŇčan numita a kawaw nida. namańßini satu, ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) ¶ukamas…ôn tu nida ku sakatur~…ĺu a nidat…ôŇčan, mar~…ĺa r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß. nika, mapawan ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **), anu mar~…ĺa r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß satu, ami ¶umud tu i r~…ĺabu nu di Ē~ °tu dinkian, anumańßida satu kan ¶a a awda…ôn kija tan…ôŇč a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ misar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj. nikuda satu, ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin ńßijanida ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar**) ar~…ĺa…ôn nida ku bar~…ĺuńßaj a di Ē~ °tu a dinki, pasu ¶i r~…ĺago ńß…ôr~…ĺup…ôn nida mapur~…ĺuŇč a pa ¶umud. r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß saam…ôr~…ĺik sa ńßijan nida ku di Ē~ °tu a dinki ni ¶ia-faŇč (*afar **) sipatajda nida i nikatapaan nida tu di Ē~ °tu a dinki nu punkaŇčan. ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin sadikudaj idaw kuni pidat…ôŇčan, paka r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj…ôn ku r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß sa, ina r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß tanunamuńß sa mapaaw. ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u maŇčr~…ĺaj tu ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tinan nan, sisa sumad…ôn ni sudan ku kawaw, kija tan…ôŇč ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u sia ¶awa ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin (ar~…ĺaddin***) nan, ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u (prin ¶…ôss *asmin…ô****) atu ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin makakunjaku tu. ja r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß r~…ĺar~…ĺiwsatu tu a-k…ô-r~…ĺa-ba (agrabańß ****), jadatu ta ¶uw ¶uwa mińßar~…ĺijud tu kitakit. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: A-la-tin (kamu nu Hulam: ťėŅśčČšłĀ, kamu nu In-gu: Aladdin) kakungkuan a kamu Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) u A-ke-la-pa (Agrabah, ťėŅś†ľśčČŚ∑ī) wan-kuo Su-dan wan a Ta-wi-ci-e , mangalay cinida micumud i mitimaay a buhungan, dayhan tiyabuhung idaw ku muenengay a lalimenah nu di'tu a dinki. (Iago)ÁôľÁŹĺ, . nika, cinida atu nida matineng musakamuay a ayam ci Ay-ke (lago ŤČĺś†ľ) maadih nida, u kumiculimekay "caay henay kaw masaditay nu bunaw" atu cabay nida taneng micumud tina buhangan. . Sudan a tataynaan a wawa nida ci Mu-li kun-cu makai cinida tu caayay kalipahakay anikaudipan, sisa laliwan nida ku hun-kun , makatukuh i Ake-lapa (Agrabah, ťėŅś†ľśčČŚ∑ī) a nabakuan midang miales tuna balucu'an. . itida, malitemuh nida i patiyamay ku cacay a wawa ci A-la-tin atu kanamuhan nida a ungay ci Abu . matineng ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) alaw ci A-la-tin kuyda sa "caay henay kaw masaditay nu bunaw" , dakep hantu nida. sakamusa ci Mu-li kun-cu paydaneng ci A-la-tin , nika ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) pabeban nida mapatay tu ci A-la-tin sa. misababalaki ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ), alanida ci A-la-tinan namakayda i papululan pataydahan i buhung. i buhungay idaw ku cacaya a tana' ladayen kuheni mikilim tu di'tu a dinki, tawya sacumud nu buhung sakamusa u di'tu nu dinki acacay ku tiyungan amanan pitiyun tu cancanan, nika ci A-la-tin maala satu nida ku di'tu a dinki, ci Apu mangalay henay miubi tu i buhungay a sumanahay nu bunaw, sisa pelad satu ku buhung. ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) kusaan anumaala numaku ku di'tu a dinki sa a patayen numaku ci A-la-tin sa, nika ci Apu kalad hanida ku lima ni Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ), alawen nida ku di'tu a dinki pasaydan nida i putah milaliw. kilul satu, mapelad kiyu buhung, manengil satu ci A-la-tin , maadih nida cinidatu caayay henay piliyas tina buhungan, sisa awawen nida ku di'tu a dinki a lalimenah . u lalimenah sakamusa ci A-la-tin nan, taneng cinida asingalih ci A-la-tin tu tuluay a kasingalihan, ci A-la-tin sakamu hanida ku lalimenah , mangalay cinida acaay kasingalih tunu udip tu a kasingalihan miliyas tina buhungan. ina lalimenah midateng henay tu sapisulul ci A-la-tin , palita han ni A-la-tin ku lalimenah mahica ku nidatengan numisu sa. sakamusa ku lalimenah, hatiniay tu nutenes numaku itini mapulul i dindinki, sisa mangalay kaku tuci A-la-tin na misanu duma a cacaya nida tu nidatengan paka miliys tu lalimenah miliyas tina dinkian. . mihangsa ci A-la-tin , sisa ladayen nu lalimenah kuheni miliyas tina buhungan, ci A-la-tin hantu sisa cukaymasen nida ku sakacacay a nidatengan: mala sikalisiway sikawaway a wan-ce, ci Apu hantu mala zu, mahinisa taneng tu maleacawa atu ci Mu-li kun-cu . mangalay ci Cia-fang (Jafar Ť≥ąśĖĻ) apacebu ci Su-danan nan, mangalay pakasiacwa ci Mu-li kun-cu cinidaan, kiya taneng micumud i hun-kun amipatay ci kun-cu atu ci Sudan nan, mahini sa taneng kaku mikuwan tu A-ke-ba-la (Agrabah, ťėŅś†ľśčČŚ∑ī). nika, ina kiyaku nida tuni kabahal ni A-la-tin anika tahekalan maputun kiya kawaw. bahal sa micumud ci A-la-tin i hun-kun, sakamusa tu cinidaan ci A-li wun-ce kaku sa, nika ci Mu-li kun-cu caay pa'lihi nida, nasan tu cinidaan namaka putahay tayni micumud mibulibulilay a siw-cuo sa. tawya a labi, malalitemuh aca ni Mu-li kun-cu ci A-la-tin , ci A-la-tin cebalen nida ku tana' ladayen nida ci Mu-li kun-cu tacuwacuwa miliwliw tu kanatal cacay a lalipayan, hidasatu, ci Mu-li kun-cu kiya mapalal makaadih, alawhan ina A-li wang-ce u tawyaay a demiad nika malitemuhan numaku i patiyamay a wawa han alaw ci A-la-tin nay. matineng ci A-la-tin misangan tu kakunkuan, sakamusa sawni a mangalay milaliw tu hunkun a sakaudip, sisa sumaden numaku ku udip numaku tayda i patiyamay a midang. nikudan satu, ci A-la-tin pataluma hatu nida ci Mu-li kun-cuan patayni i hun-kun, kakisu satu satu kunuheni tatusa. nipa talumaan satu ci Mu-li kun-cu itini i hun-kun, ci A-la-tin dakepen ni Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ), sakamuen nida ku misebengay a tademaw siketen ci A-la-tin sipibakah pasaydan i bayu amibakah. awawen ni A-la-tin ku lalimenah sisa maala cinida maudip, sisa u sakatusa tu nida ku sasalungucan. ci A-la-tin taluma satu i hun-kun, sakamu hatu nida ci Mu-li kun-cuan atu ci Sudanan tu laecusay nu kiyakuan ni Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ), mapaaw namin kunuheni a tatusa tu wayway nida. ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) hantu matineng tu tada udip ni Prince Ali , sisa laliwsatu cinida i hunkun. makatengil ci Sudan tu icelang nu kawaw ni A-la-tin , pabalucu satu cinida tu wanwi a kawaw asipabeli palaylay ci A-la-tin nan. ayda satu, ci A-la-tin pabalucu mangalay mihalhal idaw kuni datenngan sapatahekal tu lalimenah kiya tawya midawis tina pabeli tu aenengan a kawaw. nikudan satu, ubien ni Ay-ke (lago, ŤČĺś†ľ) ku dinki nu di'tu, sipabeli nida ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) ngan, ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) cukaymasen nida ku saka cacay, saka tusa a nidatengan, mala Sudan nu saicelangay numi tizimaay a saydan, patayda hanida ci A-la-tin i masa cacaya nu sulesuledaan. ci A-la-tin kacawen nida ku di'tu a tana' taluma' i Agrabah , ci Mu-li kun-cu milawlaw tu balucu ni Cia-fang (Jafar Ť≥ąśĖĻ) ku mangalay miubi tu di'tu a dinki. nika, makadih ni Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) ci A-la-tin , milalebu cinidaan. ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) sakamusa tu udip u " i kitakit saicelangay nu tademaw kaku sa ", nika ci A-la-tin pacekilen nida, kanahatu hatida ku icelang numisu caay tu pikikaka tu lalimenah, dayhan u lalimenah yadah ku caaya kaw kakatinengan numita a kawaw nida. namahini satu, ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ) cukamasen tu nida ku sakatulu a nidatengan, mala lalimenah. nika, mapawan ci Cia-fang (Jafar, Ť≥ąśĖĻ), anu mala lalimenah satu, amicumud tu i labu nu di'tu dinkian, anumahida satu kanca a awdaen kiya taneng a tahekal misalihalay. nikuda satu, ci A-la-tin hiyanida ci Cia-fang (JafarŤ≥ąśĖĻ) alaen nida ku baluhay a di'tu a dinki, pasu ci lago helupen nida mapulung a pacumud. lalimenah saamelik sa hiyan nida ku di'tu a dinki ni Cia-fang (Jafar Ť≥ąśĖĻ) sipatayda nida i nikatapaan nida tu di'tu a dinki nu punkangan. ci A-la-tin sadikuday idaw kuni pidatengan, paka lihalayen ku lalimenah sa, ina lalimenah tanunamuh sa mapaaw. ci Mu-li kun-cu manglay tuci A-la-tinan nan, sisa sumaden ni Sudan ku kawaw, kiya taneng ci Mu-li kun-cu siacawa ci A-la-tin (AladdinťėŅśčČšłĀ) nan, ci Mu-li kun-cu (Princess JasmineŤĆČŤéČŚÖ¨šłĽ) atu ci A-la-tin makakunyaku tu. ya lalimenah laliwsatu tu A-ke-la-ba (Agrabah ťėŅś†ľśčČŚ∑ī), yadatu tacuwcuwa mihaliyud tu kitakit. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
S.PHON: a-r~…ĺa-tin (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***, kamu nu in-gu: ar~…ĺaddin) kakuŇčkuan a kamu ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) u a-k…ô-r~…ĺa-pa (agrabańß, ****) wan-kuo su-dan wan a ta-wi- ¶i-…ô , maŇčar~…ĺaj ¶inida mi ¶umud i mitimaaj a buńßuŇčan, dajńßan tijabuńßuŇč idaw ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß nu di Ē~ °tu a dinki. (iago)**, . nika, ¶inida atu nida matin…ôŇč musakamuaj a ajam ¶i aj-k…ô (r~…ĺago **) maadińß nida, u kumi ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkaj " ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaw masaditaj nu bunaw" atu ¶abaj nida tan…ôŇč mi ¶umud tina buńßaŇčan. . sudan a tatajnaan a wawa nida ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u makai ¶inida tu ¶aajaj kar~…ĺipańßakaj anikaudipan, sisa r~…ĺar~…ĺiwan nida ku ńßun-kun , makatukuńß i ak…ô-r~…ĺapa (agrabańß, ****) a nabakuan midaŇč miar~…ĺ…ôs tuna bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an. . itida, mar~…ĺit…ômuńß nida i patijamaj ku ¶a ¶aj a wawa ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin atu kanamuńßan nida a uŇčaj ¶i abu . matin…ôŇč ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) ar~…ĺaw ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin kujda sa " ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaw masaditaj nu bunaw" , dak…ôp ńßantu nida. sakamusa ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u pajdan…ôŇč ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin , nika ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) pab…ôban nida mapataj tu ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin sa. misababar~…ĺaki ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **), ar~…ĺanida ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tinan namakajda i papur~…ĺur~…ĺan patajdańßan i buńßuŇč. i buńßuŇčaj idaw ku ¶a ¶aja a tana Ē~ ° r~…ĺadaj…ôn kuńß…ôni mikir~…ĺim tu di Ē~ °tu a dinki, tawja sa ¶umud nu buńßuŇč sakamusa u di Ē~ °tu nu dinki a ¶a ¶aj ku tijuŇčan amanan pitijun tu ¶an ¶anan, nika ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin maar~…ĺa satu nida ku di Ē~ °tu a dinki, ¶i apu maŇčar~…ĺaj ńß…ônaj miubi tu i buńßuŇčaj a sumanańßaj nu bunaw, sisa p…ôr~…ĺad satu ku buńßuŇč. ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) kusaan anumaar~…ĺa numaku ku di Ē~ °tu a dinki sa a pataj…ôn numaku ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin sa, nika ¶i apu kar~…ĺad ńßanida ku r~…ĺima ni ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **), ar~…ĺaw…ôn nida ku di Ē~ °tu a dinki pasajdan nida i putańß mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu, map…ôr~…ĺad kiju buńßuŇč, man…ôŇčir~…ĺ satu ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin , maadińß nida ¶inidatu ¶aajaj ńß…ônaj pir~…ĺijas tina buńßuŇčan, sisa awaw…ôn nida ku di Ē~ °tu a dinki a r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß . u r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß sakamusa ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin nan, tan…ôŇč ¶inida asiŇčar~…ĺińß ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin tu tur~…ĺuaj a kasiŇčar~…ĺińßan, ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin sakamu ńßanida ku r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß , maŇčar~…ĺaj ¶inida a ¶aaj kasiŇčar~…ĺińß tunu udip tu a kasiŇčar~…ĺińßan mir~…ĺijas tina buńßuŇčan. ina r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß midat…ôŇč ńß…ônaj tu sapisur~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin , par~…ĺita ńßan ni a-r~…ĺa-tin ku r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß mańßi ¶a ku nidat…ôŇčan mir~…ĺijs tu r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß mir~…ĺijas tina dinkian. . mińßaŇčsa ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin , sisa r~…ĺadaj…ôn nu r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß kuńß…ôni mir~…ĺijas tina buńßuŇčan, ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin ńßantu sisa ¶ukajmas…ôn nida ku saka ¶a ¶aj a nidat…ôŇčan: mar~…ĺa sikar~…ĺisiwaj sikawawaj a wan- ¶…ô, ¶i apu ńßantu mar~…ĺa zu, mańßinisa tan…ôŇč tu mar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awa atu ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u . maŇčar~…ĺaj ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar **) apa ¶…ôbu ¶i su-danan nan, maŇčar~…ĺaj pakasia ¶wa ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u ¶inidaan, kija tan…ôŇč mi ¶umud i ńßun-kun amipataj ¶i kun- ¶u atu ¶i sudan nan, mańßini sa tan…ôŇč kaku mikuwan tu a-k…ô-ba-r~…ĺa (agrabańß, ****). nika, ina kijaku nida tuni kabańßar~…ĺ ni a-r~…ĺa-tin anika tańß…ôkar~…ĺan maputun kija kawaw. bańßar~…ĺ sa mi ¶umud ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin i ńßun-kun, sakamusa tu ¶inidaan ¶i r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan, ńßidasatu, ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u kija mapar~…ĺar~…ĺ makaadińß, ar~…ĺawńßan ina a-r~…ĺi waŇč- ¶…ô u tawjaaj a d…ômiad nika mar~…ĺit…ômuńßan numaku i patijamaj a wawa ńßan ar~…ĺaw ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin naj. matin…ôŇč ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin misaŇčan tu kakunkuan, sakamusa sawni a maŇčar~…ĺaj mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tu ńßunkun a sakaudip, sisa sumad…ôn numaku ku udip numaku tajda i patijamaj a midaŇč. nikudan satu, ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin patar~…ĺuma ńßatu nida ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶uan patajni i ńßun-kun, kakisu satu satu kunuńß…ôni tatusa. nipa tar~…ĺumaan satu ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u itini i ńßun-kun, ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin dak…ôp…ôn ni ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **), sakamu…ôn nida ku mis…ôb…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw sik…ôt…ôn ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin sipibakańß pasajdan i baju amibakańß. awaw…ôn ni a-r~…ĺa-tin ku r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß sisa maar~…ĺa ¶inida maudip, sisa u sakatusa tu nida ku sasar~…ĺuŇču ¶an. ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin tar~…ĺuma satu i ńßun-kun, sakamu ńßatu nida ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶uan atu ¶i sudanan tu r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj nu kijakuan ni ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **), mapaaw namin kunuńß…ôni a tatusa tu wajwaj nida. ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) ńßantu matin…ôŇč tu tada udip ni prin ¶…ô ar~…ĺi , sisa r~…ĺar~…ĺiwsatu ¶inida i ńßunkun. makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ¶i sudan tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu kawaw ni a-r~…ĺa-tin , pabar~…ĺu ¶u satu ¶inida tu wanwi a kawaw asipab…ôr~…ĺi par~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin nan. ajda satu, ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin pabar~…ĺu ¶u maŇčar~…ĺaj °tu, sipab…ôr~…ĺi nida ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) Ňčan, ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) ¶ukajmas…ôn nida ku saka ¶a ¶aj, saka tusa a nidat…ôŇčan, mar~…ĺa sudan nu sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj numi tizimaaj a sajdan, patajda ńßanida ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin i masa ¶a ¶aja nu sur~…ĺ…ôsur~…ĺ…ôdaan. ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin ka ¶aw…ôn nida ku di Ē~ °tu a tana Ē~ ° tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i agrabańß , ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu bar~…ĺu ¶u ni ¶ia-faŇč (*afar **) ku maŇčar~…ĺaj miubi tu di Ē~ °tu a dinki. nika, makadińß ni ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin , mir~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu ¶inidaan. ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) sakamusa tu udip u " i kitakit sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu tad…ômaw kaku sa ", nika ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin pa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ…ôn nida, kanańßatu ńßatida ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč numisu ¶aaj tu pikikaka tu r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß, dajńßan u r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß jadańß ku ¶aaja kaw kakatin…ôŇčan numita a kawaw nida. namańßini satu, ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **) ¶ukamas…ôn tu nida ku sakatur~…ĺu a nidat…ôŇčan, mar~…ĺa r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß. nika, mapawan ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar, **), anu mar~…ĺa r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß satu, ami ¶umud tu i r~…ĺabu nu di Ē~ °tu dinkian, anumańßida satu kan ¶a a awda…ôn kija tan…ôŇč a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ misar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj. nikuda satu, ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin ńßijanida ¶i ¶ia-faŇč (*afar**) ar~…ĺa…ôn nida ku bar~…ĺuńßaj a di Ē~ °tu a dinki, pasu ¶i r~…ĺago ńß…ôr~…ĺup…ôn nida mapur~…ĺuŇč a pa ¶umud. r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß saam…ôr~…ĺik sa ńßijan nida ku di Ē~ °tu a dinki ni ¶ia-faŇč (*afar **) sipatajda nida i nikatapaan nida tu di Ē~ °tu a dinki nu punkaŇčan. ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin sadikudaj idaw kuni pidat…ôŇčan, paka r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj…ôn ku r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß sa, ina r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß tanunamuńß sa mapaaw. ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u maŇčr~…ĺaj tu ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tinan nan, sisa sumad…ôn ni sudan ku kawaw, kija tan…ôŇč ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u sia ¶awa ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin (ar~…ĺaddin***) nan, ¶i mu-r~…ĺi kun- ¶u (prin ¶…ôss *asmin…ô****) atu ¶i a-r~…ĺa-tin makakunjaku tu. ja r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß r~…ĺar~…ĺiwsatu tu a-k…ô-r~…ĺa-ba (agrabańß ****), jadatu ta ¶uw ¶uwa mińßar~…ĺijud tu kitakit. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
